title: Native macOS shell framework
decision: The native macOS shell uses SwiftUI first, with narrow AppKit interop only for platform behavior SwiftUI cannot cover cleanly.
consequences: Native UI implementation must trace major shell regions to the Track AP Figma artifact.
AppKit-only code paths are allowed for window, menu, file, drag-and-drop or platform integration behavior when they are isolated behind the native adapter boundary.
The Rust core remains free of UI, platform and renderer dependencies.
